patch:
diff --blockpatch a/file.txt b/file.txt
blockpatch version 1
blockpatch move id=move-1 payload-sha256=10d316fe0179a4ccaa97a509f75294785f941d7f9b0656684844edcdf1b5a01a
--- a/file.txt
+++ b/file.txt

@@ -1,3 +1,2 @@ blockpatch-source id=move-1
 alpha
-move me
 omega

@@ -4,1 +4,2 @@ blockpatch-target id=move-1
 target
+move me
